title: Everything You Need to Know About PDF Receipt Generation for Crypto Stores — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Payment confirmed, receipt generated, download link sent — all within 30 seconds. The fully automated digital product pipeline.

content.text: You’ve just sold your first ebook in Nigeria, but PayPal blocks your account. Stripe won’t let you onboard. Even Gumroad flags your IP. Now your buyer paid in USDT, but you’re stuck emailing download links manually. What if the file doesn’t arrive? What if they paid the wrong amount? This is where automated PDF receipt generation saves your business. It’s not just a nice-to-have—it’s proof of purchase, delivery confirmation, and trust builder in one. Here’s how to make it work without touching a line of code.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

PDF receipt generation for crypto stores is your silent salesperson. It’s an automated document that confirms payment, lists the product, and includes a secure download link. Why does this matter? In restricted markets like Iran or Venezuela, buyers need proof they didn’t just send crypto into the void. For creators, it’s a way to avoid disputes, track sales, and look professional—even if you’re operating from a smartphone in Dhaka. No more scrambling to find transaction IDs or manually typing emails. The receipt is the handshake that closes the deal.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Here’s the pipeline: A buyer sends crypto → payment processor (like NOWPayments) verifies the transaction → webhook triggers the Core Shop Engine → engine generates a PDF with buyer details, product info, and encrypted download link → PDF is emailed instantly. Webhooks are the secret sauce—they’re real-time alerts that tell your system when to act. The engine handles payment verification, file hosting, and receipt design. You don’t need a server, API keys, or even a payment processor account. It’s a self-contained machine that runs 24/7, even if your power cuts out in Lagos.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This system is for creators in places where ‘just use Stripe’ is a joke. If you’re selling digital products in Kenya but can’t get a PayPal account, or in Pakistan where banks flag crypto transactions, this is your lifeline. It’s also for solo developers building crypto-native stores who want to skip the KYC mess. The key? No middlemen. No subscriptions. One-time payment, lifetime access. If you’ve ever lost a sale because you couldn’t prove delivery, this fixes it. It’s not just tech—it’s your reputation.
Every order gets the same automated treatment — whether it arrives at noon or 3am, whether it is one order or ten.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Three parts power this: 1. **Payment Processor** (NOWPayments) handles 300+ coins with no KYC. 2. **Core Shop Engine** ($49.99) is the brain—it verifies payments, generates PDFs, and sends emails. 3. **Admin Dashboard** (optional add-on) lets you track transactions and resend receipts if needed. The engine’s webhook integration means it talks to your payment processor without you lifting a finger. Receipts include QR codes for quick verification, dynamic pricing in BTC/ETH/USDT, and your branding. It’s a plug-and-play system where every piece is designed to work in restricted markets.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Start by mapping your sales flow. Where do buyers drop off? Is it payment confusion, missing downloads, or trust issues? Implement automated receipts to fix all three. Test the system with a $1 product—send USDT from a friend’s wallet, watch the PDF land in their inbox. Once it works, scale. Use the Admin Dashboard to spot failed deliveries (maybe they sent BNB instead of BNB Smart Chain) and fix them before the buyer complains. This isn’t just about selling—it’s about building a system that runs itself while you create.
How does automated digital product delivery work?

Automated digital product delivery works by linking payment verification to file delivery via webhooks. When a buyer pays, the payment processor sends a signal (webhook) to your system. If the payment is valid, the system instantly emails a download link or generates a PDF receipt with the link embedded. This eliminates manual errors, ensures buyers get their product immediately, and provides proof of purchase. The Core Shop Engine handles this entire process without requiring a payment processor account, making it ideal for creators in restricted regions.
The webhook fires, the engine verifies, the receipt generates, the link delivers — all within 30 seconds of payment.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you’re searching for how to auto-send download links after crypto payments or how NOWPayments webhooks work with digital fulfillment, the Core Shop Engine ($49.99) is your answer. It’s the backend that connects your crypto payments to automated delivery, whether you’re selling in the Philippines or Ethiopia. Check out the full system at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see how it replaces manual work with a machine that never sleeps.
Your Action Checklist

Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your NOWPayments webhook endpoint URL in your NOWPayments account settings — this is the connection point between payment and delivery. Upload your product files to the configured delivery paths. Set the webhook secret key in both NOWPayments and your engine configuration so the engine can verify that webhooks are legitimate. Test the webhook by completing a real mainnet transaction — confirm in your server logs that the webhook was received, parsed, and processed correctly. Check that the delivery email arrived with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and confirm the transaction appears with correct status. Set up email delivery monitoring — confirm your transactional email service is configured and not sending to spam. Check the Admin Dashboard every day for the first week to confirm orders are processing correctly. After the first week of clean operation, move to checking once every few days for any flagged exceptions.
Automation does not just save time — it eliminates the human error failure modes that manual fulfillment cannot avoid.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
